title: Chickens to Ducks.
description: Turns all chicken variants into ducks.
body:
**Changes chickens to ducks!**

Temperate chicken - Male Mallard duck.

Warm chicken - Female Mallard duck.

Cold Chicken - Crested duck.

![All three of them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bcf1d8e09c826e1b5331c2be14edfdb10b88444.png)
